status: Unified typography to sans-serif across all pages. Replaced Cormorant Garamond with DM Sans for display headings. Bumped font-weights 300-400 to 500-600. Aligned Docs page header/footer with FAQ/Troubleshoot pattern.
built: Unified --font-display CSS variable to DM Sans
Bumped heading font-weights for sans-serif hierarchy
Aligned Docs page layout with FAQ/Troubleshoot pattern
decisions: Changed --font-display from Cormorant Garamond to DM Sans
Bumped heading weights: 300→600 for titles, 300→500 for CTA/pricing
Kept 300 weight for decorative numerals (step numbers, tier numbers)
Used var(--font-display) in Header instead of literal font-family
Matched Docs maxWidth to 760px like FAQ/Troubleshoot
next_steps: Visual QA across all page routes
Verify no serif remnants in browser DevTools
conversation_context: Unified site typography from mixed serif/sans-serif to pure sans-serif. The site was using Cormorant Garamond (serif) for --font-display headings, DM Sans for body, and JetBrains Mono for code. Changed --font-display to DM Sans so all headings use sans-serif. Bumped font-weights since sans-serif at 300-400 looks too thin for headings. Removed Cormorant from Google Fonts URL. Fixed Header.tsx literal serif reference. Aligned Docs page header/footer with FAQ/Troubleshoot pages (maxWidth 760, m.cuer.ai back link, cross-link footer). Committed as mem-164 on frontend-v2 branch.
